summary: Successfully completed frontend testing of Ben's Road Service landing page. Previous dropdown selection issues in quote calculator have been FIXED. All core functionality now working: quote form generates estimates, submits requests, appears in admin dashboard, language toggle works, and mobile FABs are visible.
passed_tests: Quote calculator form - dropdown selections now working (FIXED)
Vehicle type dropdown - successfully selects sedan/car
Service type dropdown - successfully selects emergency towing
Quote estimate generation - displays pricing breakdown ($85 base + $52.50 mileage + $25 emergency = $162.50 total)
Quote request submission - successfully submits with confirmation message
Admin dashboard login with admin/bensroadservice2024 credentials
Quote appears in admin dashboard - shows in pending status with correct details
Admin dashboard displays stats (Total: 3, Pending: 2, Contacted: 1, Completed: 0)
Language toggle (EN/ES) works on all sections including mobile
Mobile floating action buttons (FABs) all visible: call, text, directions, quote
FAB call button has correct tel: link (tel:9713886300)
Header navigation elements visible on mobile and desktop

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All APIs confirmed working via previous tests
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All features tested and working, dropdown issues resolved
